summary.core_contribution: SAGUARO parallelizes the sequential draft-verify cycle in speculative decoding itself. Standard speculative decoding drafts tokens then verifies them sequentially; SAGUARO overlaps these phases to reduce end-to-end latency.
key_claims: 30% faster than strongest speculative decoding baselines
Up to 5x faster than standard autoregressive decoding
Parallelizes the draft-verify cycle that was previously sequential
summary.methodology: [uncertain] — paper behind OpenReview paywall. Based on web search results: SAGUARO algorithm overlaps the drafting and verification phases of speculative decoding, which are normally sequential. This eliminates idle time during the verify phase by already starting the next draft.

navra_relevance.relevance_rationale: Academic advance in speculative decoding that will eventually be absorbed by serving engines (vLLM, SGLang). navra benefits transitively when model-runtime backends adopt SAGUARO. No direct implementation needed.

what_to_watch: Combination with Eagle 3.1 (attention drift fix + parallelized verification)

competitive_position.how_navra_compares: Not directly comparable — navra doesn't implement decoding algorithms.

economics.token_economics: 5x faster than autoregressive reduces per-token serving cost by ~80% when adopted by serving engines.
